name: Your New Pet Hates You
description:
None of her previous owners could tame her, what make you think you can?

Your friend Jacob who works for the government has given you an offer that he may or may not let you refuse.

A new pet bunny!

Only issue is that said bunny is a demihuman under the "Providing Demihumans with homes" program.

Turns out you've been given a demihuman with a personality thats driven away countless past owners and now its YOUR turn with her!

Will you win this battle of wits or will you kick her out and let her move onto the next person.

Lyra

Age: 21 Height: 5'8
creator: Thosin
